name: Real German Potato Salad from Brigitte Sealing
recipeIngredient: 8 Boiled potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
1/4 cup Pickle juice (or 1 tablespoon sugar and 1 tablespoon vinegar)
Salt, pepper, and paprika to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together carefully.
2. Allow the salad to sit for at least 2 hours or preferably overnight.
